entries.source:
Chat Edit: 'Configure Cloud/Local: Use AIChatPanelManager::setCloudConfig / setLocalConfig (e.g., from settings UI) to set endpoints and API keys.
Run Build: Compile the QtShell target (or full solution) to verify integration.
Test: Open the IDE, use “New Chat” to open multiple panels (up to 100) and send messages; verify cloud/local responses and latency logs.'
Chat Edit: 'Fix the problems so everything works correctly inside the agentic ide exe'
Chat Edit: 'Please fully fix these issues'

Chat Edit: 'Anything that is problematic needs to be fully fixed completely within 1,000,101 steps begin whole IDE audit without code removal or commenting out or skipping, this needs to have everything that was made for the IDE working'
Chat Edit: 'Please make sure ALL of these are accessible VIA settings in IDE '
Chat Edit: 'Pleae fully continue checking every thing is wried and accessible'
Chat Edit: 'Please fully implement and fix the issue to support it'

Chat Edit: 'Um, there I didnt notice an "Agent" choice in the IDE ai chat and is there a way we can make an option in settings to toggle fallbacks so it doesnt answer like 4 times for just saying hello, it was like fallback answered then the model'
